tool.name: Bifrost Bridge
tool.command:
bridge_qc \ #if $mlst_output: --mlst_path '$mlst_output' \ #end if #if $fastp_output: --fastp_path '$fastp_output' \ #end if #if $quast_output: --quast_path '$quast_output' \ #end if #if $plasmidfinder_output: --plasmidfinder_path '$plasmidfinder_output' \ #end if #if $bracken_output: --bracken_path '$bracken_output' \ #end if #if $amrfinder_output: --amrfinder_path '$amrfinder_output' \ #end if #if $amrfinder_version_output: --amrfinder_version_path '$amrfinder_version_output' \ #end if #if $pmlst_output: --pmlst_path '$pmlst_output' \ #end if #if $rmlst_output: --rmlst_path '$rmlst_output' \ #end if #if $ssiamb_output: --ssiamb_path '$ssiamb_output' \ #end if #if $shovill_output: --shovill_path '$shovill_output' \ #end if --output_path qc_output.tsv &&
mkdir -p config && ln -s '$__tool_directory__/config/mapping.yaml' config/mapping.yaml && ln -s '$__tool_directory__/config/QC_rules.tsv' config/QC_rules.tsv && ln -s '$__tool_directory__/config/QC_tests.tsv' config/QC_tests.tsv &&
uqcme \ --config '$__tool_directory__/config/config.yaml' \ --file qc_output.tsv
## Outputs
tool.help:
usage: bridge_qc [-h] [--mlst_path MLST_PATH] [--fastp_path FASTP_PATH] [--quast_path QUAST_PATH] [--plasmidfinder_path PLASMIDFINDER_PATH] [--bracken_path BRACKEN_PATH] [--amrfinder_path AMRFINDER_PATH] [--pmlst_path PMLST_PATH] [--ssiamb_path SSIAMB_PATH] [--shovil_path SHOVILL_PATHH] [--combine_output] [--output_path OUTPUT_PATH]
Command-line interface for processing QC data. This function processes MLST, FASTP, QUAST, PlasmidFinder, and Bracken data files based on the provided command-line arguments. It supports specifying input file paths for MLST, FASTP, QUAST, PlasmidFinder, and Bracken data, and outputs the processed data to specified paths. Arguments: mlst_path (str): Path to the MLST input file. fastp_path (str): Path to the FASTP input file. quast_path (str): Path to the QUAST input file. plasmidfinder_path (str): Path to the PlasmidFinder input file. bracken_path (str): Path to the Bracken input file. amrfinder_path (str): Path to the AMRFinder input file. pmlst_path (str): Path to the PMLST input file. output_path (str): Path to the output file (default: './output.tsv').
options: -h, --help show this help message and exit --mlst_path MLST_PATH --fastp_path FASTP_PATH --quast_path QUAST_PATH --plasmidfinder_path PLASMIDFINDER_PATH --bracken_path BRACKEN_PATH --amrfinder_path AMRFINDER_PATH --amrfinder_version_path AMRFINDER_VERSION_PATH --pmlst_path PMLST_PATH --rmlst_path RMLST_PATH --ssiamb_path SSIAMB_PATH --shovil_path SHOVILL_PATH --combine_output (default: False) --output_path OUTPUT_PATH (default: ./output.tsv)
